executives.name: Jeneanne Hanley
executives.background: Jeneanne Hanley was formerly the Senior Vice President and President of the E-Systems division at Lear Corporation.

executives.name: Manavendra Sial
executives.background: Manavendra Sial has served as a member of our Board since 2022. He is the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Fluence Energy, Inc. and previously served as CFO of SunPower Corporation.
